description: Fix publisher.py to enforce schedule-aware posting: when running 'post --account EN' without --slot, only publish posts whose scheduled_time has already passed. Read the current publisher.py code, understand the post flow, and add schedule enforcement. Also repost EN slots 02, 03, 04 at their correct times using --slot flag (slot 2 at 17:00 UTC, slot 3 at 21:00 UTC, slot 4 at 00:30 UTC). For now, just fix the script — the timed posting will be handled manually or via cron.
notes: Operator deleted posts 02-04 that were dumped simultaneously. Only slot 01 remains live. Fix publisher.py to be schedule-aware, then we need to repost remaining slots at correct times. Content plan is data/content_plan_20260311_EN.json. The posts need status reset back to approved for slots 02-04 since they were deleted from X.
